Careers
Careers

At Hospitals of Regina Foundation, we take pride in helping to make the lives of people in our community better. Our multidisciplinary team collaborates to bring new ideas to life, often in a fast-paced environment. We work closely together, both internally and with external stakeholders, to achieve our goals while maintaining a high standard of work. Celebrating our achievements is an essential part of our culture, whether it is for birthdays or the completion of a successful campaign. Stay in touch with us to find out about potential opportunities!

Position openings:

LEGACY GIVING OFFICER
Who we are

In collaboration with our partners, Hospitals of Regina Foundation raises funds to improve health care for the residents of southern Saskatchewan. We are grateful for those who have helped us deliver on our promise, made in 1987, of the best health care possible.
